channel.title: partition of metal cations; thermodynamic modelling; cobalt and nickel nitrate; solid-liquid equilibria on LMI
channel.description: Recent content in partition of metal cations; thermodynamic modelling; cobalt and nickel nitrate; solid-liquid equilibria on LMI

item.title: Partition Of Metallic Cations Between Aqueous Solutions And Mixed Crystals Of Hydrated Cobalt And Nickel Nitrates: Modelling Of The Influence Of Temperature And Composition
